news.title:
Karnataka ends EV tax exemption; introduces graded lifetime tax based on vehicle cost.
EV stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Exide, and Olectra may see focus amid policy shift.
news.summary:
Karnataka ends EV tax exemption; introduces graded lifetime tax based on vehicle cost.

news.title:
Exide Industries invests ₹450 cr in EV battery unit EESL as Bengaluru gigafactory nears commissioning.
The lithium-ion gigafactory enters its final build-out phase, transitioning to execution.
news.summary:

news.title:

Total investment in EESL now Rs. 4,802.2 cr; shareholding remains at 100%.

news.title:
Exide Industries aims for a 150 bps gross margin expansion via cost optimization, operational efficiencies, and pricing strategies.
The company plans to expand globally, ship lithium-ion cells to OEMs, and benefit from growing demand in EV, solar, and industrial segments.
news.summary:

news.title:
Exide Industries expects lithium-ion margins lower than lead acid trade but higher than lead acid OEM.
Q3 FY26 EBITDA margin at 11.7%, up 220 basis points due to volume growth and cost efficiency.
news.summary:
Exide Industries expects lithium-ion margins lower than lead acid trade but higher than lead acid OEM.

news.title:
Exide Industries plans lithium-ion cell shipments to PV, two-wheeler OEMs by FY end or next year.
Three-wheeler and e-rickshaw cells expected to drive initial revenue for Exide Industries.
news.summary:
